info.name: Workday Integration Workday Payroll API
Pay Groups
Workday Integration Retrieve a collection of pay groups

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns a collection of pay groups configured in the tenant, which define payroll processing schedules and parameters.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve a specific pay group

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Returns the specified pay group including its configuration and schedule.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve pay group details

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns detailed pay group information including pay period dates and processing status.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve specific pay group detail

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Returns the pay group detail for the specified ID.

info.name: Jobs
Workday Integration Retrieve the pay group for a job

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Returns the pay group assignment for the specified job.

info.name: Payroll Inputs
Workday Integration Retrieve payroll inputs

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns a collection of payroll input entries for processing.

info.name: Workday Integration Create a payroll input

items.docs: Creates a new payroll input entry for an upcoming payroll run.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve a specific payroll input

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Returns the specified payroll input entry.

info.name: Workday Integration Update a payroll input

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Updates an existing payroll input entry.

info.name: Workday Integration Delete a payroll input

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

items.docs: Deletes the specified payroll input entry.

info.name: Tax Rates
Workday Integration Retrieve company SUI rates

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns company state unemployment insurance rates.

info.name: Workday Integration Create a company SUI rate

items.docs: Creates a new state unemployment insurance rate entry.

info.name: Reference Data
Workday Integration Retrieve pay components

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns the available pay components that can be used in payroll inputs.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve run categories

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: The zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns the available payroll run categories.
